sections.content:
Now all 5 buttons are w (light gray). The pattern is www, www, www, www, www - all buttons are now the same color. But the yellow shapes haven't changed. Let me think about what the goal might be.
Looking at the layout:
- 5 buttons horizontally at row 42
- Below each button, there's a vertical stem at rows 44-46
- The stems alternate: B, w, B, w, w (black, gray, black, gray, gray)
Wait, let me look at the stems more carefully:
Row 44: WBWWWWwWWWWBWWWWwWWWWwWWW
Row 45: WBWWWWwWWWWBWWWWwWWWWwWWW
Row 46: WBWWWWwWWWWBWWWWwWWWWwWWW
The stems at col 21, 26, 31, 36, 41:
- Col 21: B (black)
- Col 26: w (light gray)
- Col 31: B (black)
- Col 36: w (light gray)
- Col 41: w (light gray)
So the stems are B, w, B, w, w - same as the original button pattern!
The buttons are now all w. The stems are B, w, B, w, w.
Maybe the goal is to make the buttons match the stems? The stems are B, w, B, w, w. So I need to toggle buttons 1 and 3 back to B.
Let me try clicking buttons 1 and 3 to toggle them back to B, matching the stem pattern.
